docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,080.00 FILED BY GRABER, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT FILAMOR, LEAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRABER, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT FILAMOR, LEAH
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF GRABER, JEFFREY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-17-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FILAMOR, LEAH
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY GRABER, JEFFREY FILAMOR, LEAH
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRABER, JEFFREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FILAMOR, LEAH $4,080.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,140.00, THE TOTAL AMOUNT IS DIVIDED AS FOLLOWS: $1000 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE; $1,580 FOR MEDICAL TREATMENT; AND $1,500 FOR PAIN AND SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FILAMOR, LEAH
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
